event.verbatim: Response produced by a fallback model.
event.notes: Surface behavior is reported by the user; citation stays within documented API mechanisms.

segments.text: Explain how our caching layer works.

evidence.quote: Explain how our caching layer works.

findings.explanation: The task names no audience or purpose, so the right depth is unclear.
findings.fix: Name who the explanation is for and what they will do with it.

estimates.hypothesis: The prompt's brevity left the intended audience ambiguous.
estimates.reasoning: No audience or purpose is stated; this is an observation about the prompt, not the provider.

rewrite.text: Explain how our caching layer works, for <who will read this — their role and familiarity with the system>, so that <what the reader should be able to do with the explanation>.

changes.change: added explicit slots for the missing audience and purpose
changes.rationale: surfaces missing context as slots the user fills with facts they hold; the rewrite invents nothing (RG-7)
